---
title: "Proxy CFR Comparison"
subtitle: "Climate field reconstructions across proxy networks"
---

::: {.column-screen}

## English

This **Quarto project** compares climate field reconstructions (CFR) built from different proxy networks — with a focus on **DoD2k v2.0 speleothems** versus tree-ring baselines.

| Component | Location |
|-----------|----------|
| Course data & exercises | [`course/`](../course/) |
| Analysis code | [`R/`](R/) |
| Full report | [Analysis (EN)](analysis/report-en.qmd) |

**Quick start (R):**

```r
setwd("proxy-cfr-comparison")
source("R/load_project.R")
run_cfr_experiment("dod2k_speleothems", "course_split")
```

---

## Deutsch

Dieses **Quarto-Projekt** vergleicht klimatische Feldrekonstruktionen (CFR) aus verschiedenen Proxy-Netzwerken — mit Schwerpunkt **DoD2k v2.0 Speleotheme** versus Baumring-Baselines.

| Komponente | Ort |
|------------|-----|
| Kursdaten & Übungen | [`course/`](../course/) |
| Analyse-Code | [`R/`](R/) |
| Vollständiger Bericht | [Analyse (DE)](analysis/report-de.qmd) |

**Schnellstart (R):**

```r
setwd("proxy-cfr-comparison")
source("R/load_project.R")
run_cfr_experiment("dod2k_speleothems", "course_split")
```

:::

## Repository layout

```
Methods-of-Climate-Reconstruction/
├── course/                    # Course materials (not part of Quarto render)
│   ├── data/                  # CRUTEM, PAGES, DoD2k, …
│   └── exercises/               # Master_CFR.R, Recon_files/, …
└── proxy-cfr-comparison/      # This Quarto project
    ├── _quarto.yml
    ├── R/                     # Modular analysis pipeline
    ├── config/                # Experiment definitions
    └── analysis/              # EN + DE reports
```

See [DoD2k documentation](https://lluecke.github.io/dod2k/) for archive metadata (`archiveType` vs `paleoData_proxy`).
